title: Complete Galar Fossilmon E19 Icons
description: Adds Complete Galar Fossilmon compatibility to the E19 Cobblemon icon pack.
body: Adds [Complete Galar Fossilmon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/complete-galar-fossilmon) icons to Xaero's map and minimap in the style of [E19](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/e19_cobblemon_minimap_icons). Icons were created by Dogtor Bloo and are used here with permission.
